title: i've been surprised to see how quickly Claude is getting better at long context retrieval + reasoning. also, we just announced flat pricing across the full context window to 1M tokens. it's a good time to explore long context when building with Claude. https://x.com/RLanceMartin/status/2032510338336436647?s=20
